economic_notes: Nation has investments in multiple limited partnerships and holding corporations including Matullia Holdings, Skungeenes Holdings, Xhamasung Holdings, and 1161742 BC Ltd. Also has 33 1/3% ownership in Salish Sea Industrial Services Ltd. reported at cost. Kosapsum Development Corporation is fully consolidated.
notes: Social assistance and health are combined as one line item at $887,472. Deferred revenue decreased significantly from $156,220 to $91,923. Long-term debt increased substantially from $690,255 to $1,538,171 mainly due to CMHC funding for town homes project ($1,136,485). A $50,000 loan to Greater Victoria Harbour Authority was forgiven during the year. Construction in progress of $2,580,303 in 2021 was completed and transferred to tangible capital assets. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable ($351,093) plus deferred revenue ($91,923) = $442,016. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + Gov Canada other + FNHA/CSETS + CMHC + School District + Province of BC = $2,563,046 + $1,651,709 + $1,796,503 + $33,771 + $105,683 + $602,096 + $597,000 (portion of settlement trust from government) = approximated at $7,350,808. OSR includes commercial leases, investment income, earnings from business enterprises, and other miscellaneous items.
